documentation.text:
@notice Record a completed payment. Callable by anyone, but `msg.sender`
         is always the recorded sender — you cannot log a payment on
         someone else's behalf. `amount` is denominated however the
         caller wants (e.g. USDC base units); this contract only stores
         and emits it, it does not interpret decimals.

PaymentRegistry.Stats","name":"","type":"tuple"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"string","name":"fromHandle","type":"string"},{"internalType":"string","name":"toHandle","type":"string"},{"internalType":"string","name":"note","type":"string"}],"name":"logPayment","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"statsOf","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"totalSentWei","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"totalReceivedWei","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"sentCount","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"receivedCount","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalPayments","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalVolumeWei","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"No handle registration or ownership \u2014 handles are display-only strings      supplied by the caller (sourced from the backend) purely for event      readability. This contract never custodies funds; it's called *after*      the actual transfer has settled via Particle's Universal Account, so      it exists to give every payment a public, verifiable on-chain receipt      on Arbitrum rather than to move value itself.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"PaymentRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"logPayment(address,uint256,string,string,string)":{"notice":"Record a completed payment. Callable by anyone, but `msg.sender`         is always the recorded sender \u2014 you cannot log a payment on         someone else's behalf. `amount` is denominated however the         caller wants (e.g. USDC base units); this contract only stores         and emits it, it does not interpret decimals."}},"notice":"Lightweight, permissionless on-chain receipt log for Mink payments.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/PaymentRegistry.sol":"PaymentRegistry"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/PaymentRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfd4cf0b1418cbffc1416056a23bfa7135617bd20d1b3665978e50f726401438d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e98c1b611147142a9f96cb6ad8ca2540e18c6954066e4c6adfaf4666e2d16827","dweb:/ipfs/QmRvem2JJADgS3DEAtHJCzESU4dZGsWdkTt66q7LhvaniL"]}},"version":1}
